Sangwoo Net Co., Ltd. — Internal Legal & Compliance Memo (KRX issuer) — Date: 2026-06-01 KST
Subject: FSCMA MNPI controls regarding DPT issuance and cyber incident; PIPA handling of resident-number data
Non-public: term sheet signed with DalRiver Capital Partners for private placement of Sangwoo Net Green-DPT (tokenized REC) ahead of KRX disclosure; anchor size KRW 28.5bn; indicative discount 7.4% vs internal fair value
Commercial conditions include 18-month lock-up, investor put at par upon FSC guidance change, and a sustainability performance coupon tied to Scope 2 reduction; this is MNPI until board resolution and IR release
ESG/climate metrics (pre-assurance by Hanmin Assurance LLC) show modeled 21,300 tCO₂e avoided in 2027; figures are draft and not yet in our sustainability report
Cyber: on 2026-05-28 our custody sandbox detected anomalous API calls to DPT cold-wallet registry; keys not exfiltrated but two vault shards were touched; FSS incident notification is being prepared and not public
Insider list (비공개자명부) update: Mr. Doyoung Han, IR Team Lead, resident no. 8809 13-2 4* * * * 9, mobile +82-10-5331-****; Ms. Jiyun Choi, Compliance, resident no. 9012 31-1 ***** 7; and four advisors at Baekho Advisory
PIPA controls: resident-number data for payroll/tax will be minimized, encrypted at rest (policy v3.2), retained 5 years, and stored separately from deal files; access is logged via IDM-kr/sa ng w o o
Information barrier: IR and DPT structuring desks must not share draft term sheets, ESG models, or cyber logs; physical separation on 14F; all external inquiries routed only to compliance@sangwoonet.kr
Blackout window: directors, officers, and employees on the insider list are restricted from trading Sangwoo Net shares or Green-DPT units from 2026-05-28 until KRX bulletin and FSC acknowledgment; no selective disclosure or tipping to investors
Document access: http://ir.sangwoonet.kr/d o c s/GX_4 3 9?ver=2026-05&uid=SZ-1 9 8B (internal only); reference file: INSIDER-LIST_2 0 2 6-0 5.pdf
Educational note: our ESG/climate and blockchain FAQs on the corporate site explain carbon tokens and cyber hygiene in general terms and are for training purposes; they do not include transaction details or incident indicators
Negative MAC language: the ongoing tabletop cyber drill does not constitute a material adverse change, is not a reportable event under public filings at this time, and shall not trigger price protection clauses
Operations-only: marketing plans to use the phrase “cyber resilience for DPT” in a brochure about Sangwoo Shield products, which is generic and unrelated to the private placement or insider matters
For board questions contact Ms. Jiyun Choi (Compliance) via compliance@sangwoonet.kr or +82-2-777-****; for HR PIPA queries email hr@san gwoo net.kr; stamp code: SGN-KR/2 6/IR-MEM-03
